articles.title: Clover Food Lab puts itself on the market
articles.description:
After stabilizing its business post-bankruptcy, the company is now looking for a buyer to guide its next chapter.

The post Clover Food Lab puts itself on the market appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Clover Food Lab seeks a buyer after stabilizing post-bankruptcy operations.
The company aims to secure a new direction for its 2026 growth.
Potential sale could affect local employment and food options in Boston.

articles.title: ‘BPS transportation is failing us’: School bus delays have Boston parents calling for change
articles.description:
Thousands of students don't get to school on time every day because of delayed buses, officials said.

The post ‘BPS transportation is failing us’: School bus delays have Boston parents calling for change appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Thousands of Boston students face daily delays in school bus arrivals.
Parents demand changes as delays affect punctuality for many students.
Officials acknowledge the transportation issues are disrupting education in Boston.

articles.title: How did the ‘Seger bar’ guy get Gov. Healey for his latest video?
articles.description:
Healey made a guest appearance in the latest video from a Watertown native who’s gone viral for judging bars by one simple metric: whether they’ll rock out to some Bob Seger. 

The post How did the ‘Seger bar’ guy get Gov. Healey for his latest video? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Watertown native features Gov. Healey in his viral bar review video.
The video judges bars based on their ability to play Bob Seger music.
Local bars may see increased patronage from Seger fans after the video.

articles.title: Michelin-recommended dumpling chain Nan Xiang to open in Framingham
articles.description:
New York-based Nan Xiang Soup Dumplings is set to open its first Massachusetts location later this year.

The post Michelin-recommended dumpling chain Nan Xiang to open in Framingham appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Nan Xiang Soup Dumplings will open its first Massachusetts location in Framingham later this year.

This new restaurant will enhance Framingham's dining scene and attract food enthusiasts from Boston.

articles.title: ‘The Drama’ review: Zendaya and Robert Pattinson’s darkly funny Boston movie is designed to discomfort
articles.description:

summary: Zendaya and Robert Pattinson star in 'The Drama', a new film set in Boston.

Local theaters will screen 'The Drama', impacting Boston's cultural landscape.

articles.title: National UMass survey has bad news for Trump
articles.description:
A survey finds approval of Trump's performance in office has fallen to 33%, driven by concerns over the economy, foreign policy, and immigration.

The post National UMass survey has bad news for Trump appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: UMass survey shows Trump's approval rating at 33%, impacting local political sentiment.
Concerns over the economy, foreign policy, and immigration drive disapproval among Boston residents.
Local leaders may adjust strategies in response to declining support for Trump ahead of elections.
